title: Post-stay thank you
subject: Thank you for staying with Big Bend Burro
body:
Hi {{guestName}},

Thank you for spending time with us at {{contextLabel}} from {{dateLabel}}. We wanted to send a short follow-up while the stay is still fresh.

If there was a moment that stood out, we would love to hear it. If you have a review to share, we would also appreciate that once you are home.

We are building this place carefully, so notes about comfort, access, and the landscape experience are especially useful.

Chuck, Susan, and Burro
